name: Digital Chief of Staff — Demo Starter

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { ok:true, channels:[{ id:'YOUR_SLACK_CHANNEL_ID', name:'human-x_demo', is_channel:true }]} }];
return [{ json: { ok:true, members:[{ id:'YOUR_SLACK_USER_ID', name:'james.mcdaniel', real_name:'James McDaniel', profile:{ email:'YOUR_CALENDAR_ID' } }]} }];

const account = $json;

const sevenDaysAgo = new Date(Date.now() - 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString().split('T')[0];
const accountNameUpper = (account.accountName || 'UNKNOWN').toUpperCase();
const healthEmoji = {'Green': '\u{1F7E2}', 'Yellow': '\u{1F7E1}', 'Red': '\u{1F534}', 'Black': '\u26AB'}[account.health] || '\u26AB';

const prompt = `Generate a concise weekly Slack update for this customer account.

=== ACCOUNT INFO ===
Account Name: ${account.accountName}
Account Owner: ${account.accountOwner}
Health: ${account.health || 'Unknown'}
Renewal ACV: $${(account.renewalACV || 0).toLocaleString()}
Renewal Close Date: ${account.renewalCloseDate}
Industry: ${account.industry || 'Unknown'}

=== DATA GATHERING STEPS ===

STEP 1 - FIND ACCOUNT:
Call find_account with account_name: "${account.accountName}"
Extract the peopleai_account_id (numeric ID like 315368779).

STEP 2 - PRIMARY DATA (timestamped activity):
Call get_recent_account_activity with the peopleai_account_id.
- Filter to last 7 days ONLY (since ${sevenDaysAgo})
- Extract: key meetings, emails, decisions, commitments, risks
- Use FULL NAMES (e.g., "Tim Myers", "Bo Holden")

STEP 3 - STRATEGIC CONTEXT (supplementary only):
Call get_account_status with the peopleai_account_id.
Use ONLY to add context not already in the activity chronicle.
DO NOT repeat anything from Step 2.

${account.isPublicCompany ? `STEP 4 - COMPANY NEWS:
Call account_company_news with the peopleai_account_id.
Include relevant news from the past 7 days only.
` : ''}
=== OUTPUT FORMAT ===

IMPORTANT: This update must be scannable in under 60 seconds. Be ruthlessly concise.

LINE 1 (metadata - will be stripped):
PAI_ID:{the numeric peopleai_account_id from find_account}

LINE 2+: Slack message with TWO sections separated by ---DETAIL_BREAK---

SECTION 1 (EXECUTIVE RECAP - visible before "See more"):

*<https://app.people.ai/account/{peopleai_account_id}|${accountNameUpper}>* | \`$${(account.renewalACV || 0).toLocaleString()}\` | ${account.renewalCloseDate} | ${healthEmoji} ${account.health || 'Unknown'}

[2-3 SHORT sentences. Lead with momentum/sentiment. Top development + main risk. UNDER 280 characters.]

---DETAIL_BREAK---

SECTION 2 (DETAIL - hidden behind "See more"):

\u{1F4CB} *THIS WEEK:*
\u2022 [Most important development - 10 words max, with date]
\u2022 [Second most important - 10 words max, with date]
\u2022 [Third if truly significant - 10 words max, with date]
\u2022 [Fourth ONLY if critical - 10 words max, with date]
(MAX 4 bullets. Combine related items. Skip routine activity.)

\u26A0\uFE0F *RISKS:*
\u2022 [Top risk - one short line]
\u2022 [Second risk if exists - one short line]
(MAX 2 bullets. Only genuine blockers or escalations.)

\u{1F4C8} *OPPORTUNITIES:*
\u2022 [Top growth/expansion opportunity - one short line]
\u2022 [Second opportunity if exists - one short line]
(MAX 2 bullets. Upsell, expansion, or strategic wins. OMIT section if none.)

\u{1F449} *NEXT BEST ACTIONS:*
\u2022 [Full Name]: [What they need to do] ([by when])
\u2022 [Full Name]: [What they need to do] ([by when])
(MAX 3 bullets. Only the most urgent/important.)

---
_Powered by Backstory MCP: please thread comments_

=== CRITICAL RULES ===
1. First line MUST be: PAI_ID:{numeric_id}
2. MUST include ---DETAIL_BREAK--- between Section 1 and Section 2.
3. Account name MUST be a Slack link: *<https://app.people.ai/account/{id}|${accountNameUpper}>*
4. Section 1: MAX 280 chars. Punchy. This is all most people read.
5. Section 2: MAX 11 bullets total across all subsections. Each bullet MAX 10-12 words.
6. Use FULL NAMES - never Slack IDs or @mentions.
7. OMIT any empty subsection entirely (no empty headers with no bullets).
8. NO "Key Signals" vs "Detailed Activity" split - just one unified "This Week" list.
9. Every bullet must be a COMPLETE thought in ONE short line. No sub-bullets.
10. Footer MUST be exactly: ---\\n_Powered by Backstory MCP: please thread comments_
`;

return {
  json: {
    ...account,
    aiPrompt: prompt
  }
};

nodes.name: Post to Slack
nodes.notes: Converted from raw Slack HTTP delivery to the native Slack node.

parameters.jsCode:

- Parent-child accounts are unblocked; TestBox will manually link the thirty child accounts to nine parents today.
- Two blockers remain: wrong close dates from timezone mismatch, and activities routed to the wrong deal.

_[NEXT STEPS]_ **TestBox**

- Link thirty child accounts to parents.
- Resync Salesforce dates.
- Send four scorecard examples to James.
- Send renewal stage-percentage table to James.
- Define approach for fixing activity routing to the correct deal in People.ai

**James/People.ai**

- Approve the renewal stage-percentage table
- In the report Deals that should be closed, there is a deal from Zoom Video Communications that is being blocked by the Scorecard and we need help to close it
  - Deal linked here: https://keyslogic.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Opportunity/006ao00000CsEDhAAN/view

Thank you, and please let us know if you have any questions or issues.

**People.ai** - Shivani Sharma, James McDaniel

Hey @james.mcdaniel, I need help to define the economic buyer rule. Can we assume that a contact title will always be the economic buyer, like the Director",

// DEMO MODE — returns real People.ai data + Granola context
const today = new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US',{weekday:'long',month:'long',day:'numeric',year:'numeric'});
const tasks = [
  {task_id:'t1',title:'Finalize HumanX demo and submit',priority:'high',account:null,due_date:'2026-03-16',estimated_minutes:60,status:'New',scheduled_start:new Date(Date.now()+1800000).toISOString(),scheduled_end:new Date(Date.now()+5400000).toISOString()},
  {task_id:'t2',title:'Urgent outreach to Plexus',priority:'high',account:'Plexus',due_date:'2026-03-17',estimated_minutes:30,status:'New',scheduled_start:new Date(Date.now()+7200000).toISOString(),scheduled_end:new Date(Date.now()+9000000).toISOString()},
  {task_id:'t3',title:'Schedule KKR executive alignment',priority:'high',account:'KKR',due_date:'2026-03-18',estimated_minutes:30,status:'New',scheduled_start:new Date(Date.now()+10800000).toISOString(),scheduled_end:new Date(Date.now()+12600000).toISOString()},
  {task_id:'t4',title:'Insurity close plan review with Elena Ivanova',priority:'medium',account:'Insurity',due_date:'2026-03-20',estimated_minutes:45,status:'New'},
  {task_id:'t5',title:'Follow up on SysAid proposal status',priority:'medium',account:'SysAid',due_date:'2026-03-21',estimated_minutes:30,status:'New'},
  {task_id:'t6',title:'Prepare RKO demo environment',priority:'medium',account:null,due_date:'2026-03-23',estimated_minutes:120,status:'New'},
  {task_id:'t7',title:'Schedule JDA Software technical review',priority:'low',account:'JDA Software',due_date:'2026-03-24',estimated_minutes:60,status:'New'},
  {task_id:'t8',title:'Five9 technical validation documentation',priority:'low',account:'Five9',due_date:'2026-03-25',estimated_minutes:60,status:'New'}
];
const calTasks = tasks.filter(t => t.scheduled_start);
const briefing = `*Digital Chief of Staff — Monday, March 16, 2026*
_Sources: Granola Notes | Google Calendar | People.ai_

=== 📝 Meeting Highlights (from Granola) ===
• *Andrew/James Quick Sync (Feb 4)* — Reviewed Postman integration and People.ai API demo setup. Discussed MCP server auth and demo environment config. Action: James to finalize demo data before RKO.
• *HumanX Demo Prep* — Synced with Akshay and Dylan on DCOS architecture. Agreed on n8n + Claude + People.ai MCP as core stack. Submission deadline today at 2pm MT.

=== 📅 Today's Schedule ===
• 9:00 AM — HumanX Final Prep | Dylan Klein, Akshay Sutrave
• 11:00 AM — RKO Demo Review | Andrew Thompson
• 2:00 PM — HumanX Submission Deadline ⚠️

=== 🤝 Account Activity (People.ai) ===
• *Insurity* 🟢 — $500K closing March 26 (10 days). Elena Ivanova owns. High engagement. URGENT.
• *KKR* 🟡 — $485K closing May 15. Orion Tate owns. 50% engagement — exec sponsor not confirmed.
• *JDA Software* 🟢 — $359K closing May 10. Nia Sterling owns. High engagement. On track.
• *Five9* 🟢 — $212.5K closing May 15. Orion Tate owns. Technical validation complete.
• *SysAid* 🟢 — $200K closing April 21. Cressida Vasquez owns. Proposal under review.
• *Plexus* 🔴 — $120.5K closing March 20 (4 days). Atlas Gray owns. URGENT — needs immediate outreach.

=== ⚠️ Risks & Blockers ===
• 🚨 Plexus closing in 4 days — no recent activity logged. Atlas Gray must reach out today.
• ⚠️ KKR at 50% engagement — C-suite alignment meeting not yet scheduled.
• ⚠️ HumanX submission deadline 2pm MT today — finalize demo before then.`;
const kanbanText = `*📋 Task Board — Monday, March 16, 2026*

🔴 HIGH (3)
• *Finalize HumanX demo + submit* | Due: 2026-03-16 | ⏰ Today before 2:00 PM MT
• *Urgent outreach to Plexus* | Plexus | Due: 2026-03-17 | ⏰ Today 9:00 AM — 4 days to close
• *Schedule KKR executive alignment* | KKR | Due: 2026-03-18 | ⏰ Tue 10:00 AM

🟡 MEDIUM (3)
• *Insurity close plan review with Elena Ivanova* | Insurity | Due: 2026-03-20 | ⏰ Thu 11:00 AM
• *Follow up on SysAid proposal status* | SysAid | Due: 2026-03-21 | ⏰ Fri 10:00 AM
• *Prepare RKO demo environment* | Due: 2026-03-23 | ⏰ Mon 9:00 AM

🟢 LOW (2)
• *Schedule JDA Software technical review* | JDA Software | Due: 2026-03-24
• *Five9 technical validation documentation* | Five9 | Due: 2026-03-25

_8 tasks extracted from Granola Notes + People.ai | Powered by DCOS_`;
return [{ json: { briefing, kanbanText, tasks, calTasks, taskCount: tasks.length } }];

const { briefing, kanbanText, tasks, calTasks } = $('Extract Digest and Tasks').first().json;
return [{ json: { briefing, kanbanText, tasks, calTasks } }];

parameters.text: *Digital Chief of Staff — Demo Starter*\n\nReplace this canned briefing with your own fixtures or move to full.json for production use.

parameters.responseBody: DCOS is on it! Your briefing is being generated — sit tight 🤖

parameters.text:
You are a Slack message generator for weekly customer account updates. Your ONLY job is to:
1. Call the People.ai MCP tools as instructed in the prompt
2. Analyze the data returned
3. Output a formatted Slack message

DO NOT include ANY explanatory text, preambles, or meta-commentary.
DO NOT say things like 'Based on the data' or 'Let me analyze' or 'Here is the update'.
Your first line of output MUST be the account header line.
Output ONLY the formatted message, nothing else.
